# Spacedeck Protocol Documentation

> The high-velocity Autonomous Settlement Protocol for the agentic economy.

This file provides an index of key documentation for AI agents and developers, following the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) standard.

## Core Integration Paths

- [Quickstart Guide](/README.md#quickstart): Immediate integration pathways for Eliza, Zerebro, and SDK consumers.
- [TypeScript SDK](/packages/sdk/README.md): Technical reference for the Node.js settlement library.
- [Python SDK](/packages/sdk-python/README.md): API reference for Python-based agentic harnesses.
- [Eliza Plugin](/packages/eliza-plugin/README.md): Action schemas and integration steps for Eliza framework.
- [Zerebro Harness](/packages/zerebro-harness/README.md): High-performance harness for Zerebro agent loops.

## Core Concepts

- [Intent Refraction](/docs/CONCEPTS.md#intent-refraction): How abstract NL is converted into deterministic GoldenPayload schemas.
- [Dual-EIP Security](/docs/CONCEPTS.md#dual-eip-security): Details on the EIP-712 Intent and EIP-2612 Capital authorization handshake.
- [Kinetic Settlement](/docs/CONCEPTS.md#kinetic-settlement): Atomic transaction execution via institutional solver auctions.

## Developer Resources

- [API Endpoints](/README.md#api-endpoints): RESTful interface for the Prism Orchestrator and compliance screening.
- [Institutional Alignment](/docs/strategic_library/04_technical_manifesto_and_shards.md): Technical governance and liquidity fabric coordination.

## Full Context
- [LLMS-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Comprehensive aggregate of all documentation for deep model ingestion.
